mapper.select: SELECT N_ID, N_TITLE, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM NOTICE ORDER BY N_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (N_ID, N_TITLE, CONTENT, REG_DATE) VALUES (NOTICE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{n_title}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT N_ID, N_TITLE, CONTENT, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE N_ID = #{idx}
